checks.name: required_keys coverage in _validate()
checks.detail: Added fins_vues, echo_memory, run_history, whispers_seen to required_keys. Previously missing — a corrupted save with wrong type for fins_vues would pass validation silently.

checks.name: run_state validation completeness
checks.detail: Added anam_accumulated to _validate_run_state() required_keys. life_max + faction_rep_delta type checks still pending (SAVE-RUNSTATE-VALIDATE-EXTEND P30).

checks.name: save/load round-trip integrity
checks.detail: save_profile() uses duplicate(true). load_profile() fills defaults then validates. Backup on every save. Migration on version mismatch.

checks.name: backup/recovery mechanism
checks.detail: Primary → backup → legacy migration chain. All paths covered.

checks.name: migration fills all default keys
checks.detail: _migrate() iterates _get_default_profile() keys — all fields filled. Stats sub-keys also filled individually.

checks.name: anam_accumulated present in _get_default_run_state()
checks.detail: anam_accumulated:0 present. load_run_state() fills missing keys before _validate_run_state() — old saves auto-corrected.

checks.name: fins_vues type validation
checks.detail: Added typeof check for fins_vues (must be numeric). Added array type checks for whispers_seen/run_history/endings_seen/arc_tags. Added dict type check for echo_memory.

checks.name: echo_memory sub-structure validation
checks.detail: echo_memory dict presence now validated. Sub-keys (deaths_by_biome, dominant_factions_seen, choices_log) not yet type-checked. Analytics-only, no gameplay impact. SAVE-ECHO-MEMORY-SUBKEYS P32 proposed.
